texto: Seek to learn constantly while you live
autor: do not wait in the faith that old age by itself will bring wisdom.
explicacao: Citação de do not wait in the faith that old age by itself will bring wisdom. sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Seek to learn constantly while you live” articula reflexao, solon, learn em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
